title: Decision Flow for Selecting a Parsimonious Seasonal Model
description: A flowchart guiding the model selection process for seasonal time series, emphasizing parsimony by starting with the simplest multiplicative model and adding complexity only when statistically justified.
elements: Add AR/MA terms to non-seasonal part (p, q)
relationships: Flow from Start to Multiplicative SARIMA
If Residuals are White Noise, flow to Final Model
If Residuals show non-seasonal pattern, flow to Add AR/MA terms
If Residuals show seasonal pattern, flow to Add seasonal AR/MA terms
After adding terms, flow back to Check Model Residuals
